{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323020742BA4D74854777667CA2F1\"}"},"total":178},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7346144246154036003","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书很有深度，通过讲述几个家族的兴衰和人物的成长，展现了历史的变迁和人性的复杂。我特别喜欢书中塑造的人物形象，他们都很鲜活，各有特点。像冯德双的孙子冯惠中冯惠华，一个虎气一个文气，性格迥异却都很真实。还有那个典型的关东大地土特产地主冯子祥，也给我留下了很深的印象。剧情方面，作者把农村、工厂、军队这三大板块有机结合，让故事更加丰富多彩。我觉得这是一部很值得一读的作品。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1708840138,"group_id":"7115330040958553101","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7M+LMUAOk2tHKvzSxN1z0W9QE2EKRUA77w/TuB3RNXf","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2615110101380713","user_name":"喜欢红薯梗的沐夙山"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2615110101380713","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7115330040958553101","book_info":{"abstract":"该小说以中央国家机关选派的副处级干部白朗到江北省颖川县牛头镇上牛湾村担任乡村第一书记的生活工作为主线，讲述了白朗在实践中大胆探索，数年之内，把一个问题众多、矛盾尖锐的落后村，变成富裕文明、村民安居乐业，并带动周围八个村共同发展振兴的样板村的艰辛曲折的历程。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/e601922de787f4b84e7946fab2f6f320~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"忽培元","author_id":"","book_id":"7115330040958553101","book_name":"乡村第一书记","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e8d0","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"36.1万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":45,\"name\":\"影视小说\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=45\u00
